summary: Vertical video. A screen recording and interface walkthrough of the TrumpRx.Gov drug-pricing website over a music bed (empty transcript). It shows a search bar auto-typing queries ('we' to Wegovy, 'metabolism' to Cytomel, 'infer' to Vfend and Zyvox) with product price cards, then a row of medications and the text 'This is just the beginning' with an email signup. It contains motion graphics and a music track.
notable_text: On-screen: 'TrumpRx.Gov', search terms 'we'/'metabolism'/'infer', 'Wegovy Pen Starting at $199.00', 'Wegovy Pill Starting at $149.00', 'Cytomel Starting at $6.00', 'Vfend $306.98', 'Zyvox $122.74', 'This is just the beginning.', 'Email me updates / Sign up'. Tweet: 'Find your medication, with ease. http://TrumpRx.Gov'.
